comment.body: To correct myself here. Biden had the same problem but that was largely related to the debt ceiling issue. Once it was lifted they were able to increase supply which was absorbed by the ONRRP.  Today you have the similar issues of debt with it getting worse via trumps bill. So it’ll force over issuance in bonds at some point. That’s the crack in the bond market I think that is looming
